Business name: P Z M Computers & Mobile Phones -Sell New Used PC Build

P Z M Computers & Mobile Phones -Sell New Used PC Build is a physical electronics store in Al Barsha, Dubai.

Address: Inside Union Coop Hypermarket, Hessa Street, Al Barsha, Dubai, UAE.
Phone: +971 52 802 6677.
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/971528026677.
Website: https://pzm.ae/.

Walk-in opening hours:
Monday: 10 AM-11 PM.
Tuesday: 10 AM-11 PM.
Wednesday: 10 AM-11 PM.
Thursday: Closed for walk-in visits.
Friday: 10 AM-11 PM.
Saturday: 10 AM-11 PM.
Sunday: 10 AM-11 PM.

Phone and WhatsApp messages are received daily, including when the walk-in store is closed.

Warranty: 6-month warranty on pre-owned devices.

Core services: new phones and laptops, pre-owned phones and laptops, device trade-ins, mobile phone accessories, laptop accessories, gaming PC builds, and in-store guidance before purchase.
